place: Bophut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Beachfront Sunrise Pool Villa - Bophut
note: Fully staffed · private chef · + tax & service
blurb: A beautiful 1,041 m² beachfront villa in a managed residence estate at Bophut, perfectly positioned for sunrise views yet a six-minute drive from Fisherman’s Village. Four bedrooms in modern pavilions open toward an infinity pool, a Thai-style gazebo and the beach beyond. Fully staffed with a private chef.
detail:
Named for peaceful seclusion by the sea, this beautiful beachfront villa sits within a managed residence estate at Bophut, perfectly positioned for sunrise views while a six-minute drive from the lively Fisherman’s Village. The 1,041 m² home is set within beautifully manicured tropical gardens, its modern pavilions opening toward an infinity pool and the beach beyond.

The air-conditioned living and dining pavilions feature fold-away glass doors for breezy, open-air living. Relax in the beachfront lounge with plush sofas, or dine at the 12-seat wooden table beside the open kitchen with its Nespresso machine and breakfast bar. The infinity pool pairs with a Thai-style gazebo and direct beach access.

This is barefoot island luxury — unwind by the pool, practise yoga on the lawn, or paddle out by kayak. The open-sided sala is ideal for leisurely lunches or romantic beachfront dinners. A villa manager ensures a seamless stay, while a private chef crafts exquisite Thai and international meals. Kayaks and a BBQ grill are available for guest use on request. The shoreline in front of the estate is rocky; a short 200-metre stroll along the coast brings you to a swimmable stretch of beach.

features.l: Infinity pool · Thai-style gazebo · beach access
Kayaks & BBQ on request · 6 min to Fisherman’s Village
